title: Investigation into authentication and transfer practices used during Loblaw gift card offering
summary: The Competition Bureau of Canada uncovered that Canadians were overcharged for some packaged bread products in Loblaw, and other stores across Canada Footnote 1 . In response, Loblaw offered eligible customers a $25 Loblaw Card that could be used to purchase items sold in their grocery stores. The complainant attempted to register for a L...
